title: Service
description: An ITSI service is a representation of a real world IT service. You can configure an ITSI service to monitor various IT metrics using KPI searches, which reflect the health of a service. ITSI services can describe any real world IT service, such as a network service or email service. The `service` object contains the service definition, including entities, KPIs, and dependent services.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Auto-generated unique identifier for this service.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User defined description for the service.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: Title of this service.

attributes.name: kpis
attributes.label: kpis
attributes.description: Array of KPI descriptions for this service.

attributes.name: entity_rules
attributes.label: entity_rules
attributes.description: Array of rules describing entities referenced by this service.

attributes.name: services_depends_on
attributes.label: services_depends_on
attributes.description: Array of service descriptions with KPIs in those services that this service depends on.

attributes.name: service_id
attributes.label: service_id
attributes.description: _key value of service that this service depends on.

attributes.name: kpis_depending_on
attributes.label: kpis_depending_on
attributes.description: Array of _key ids for each KPI in service identified by serviceid, which this service will depend on.

attributes.name: services_depending_on_me
attributes.label: services_depending_on_me
attributes.description: An array of service descriptions with KPIs in this service that those services depend on.

attributes.name: serviceid
attributes.label: serviceid
attributes.description: _key value of service that depends on this service.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.label: enabled
attributes.description: If set to 1, service is enabled. If value is absent or not set to 1, service is disabled. On upgrade service is flagged as enabled.

attributes.name: sec_grp
attributes.label: sec_grp
attributes.description: The team the object belongs to.

attributes.name: base_service_template_id
attributes.label: base_service_template_id
attributes.description: The ID of the service template the service is linked to. Not required. If empty, the service is not linked to a service template. To create a service based on a service template, include this field.

attributes.name: service_tags
attributes.label: service_tags
attributes.description: The tags for the service. The `service_tags` object can have an array for `tags` and `template_tags`. `tags` are regular tags that are added manually and `template_tags` are tags that are populated from a service template. Tags have to be strings and can't contain the following characters: `/ \ " ' ! @ ? . , ; $ ^` Example `service_tags` object: JSONCopy ```json "service_tags": { "tags": [ "unix", "seattle" ], "template_tags": [ "cloud_systems", "us-west" ] }, ```

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
